mapper.select: SELECT t.content_id AS contentId, t.contect_name AS contentName, t.content_time AS contentTime, t.course_contect AS courseContext, t.ipstructional_video AS instructionalVideo, t.video_explain AS videoExplain, -- 上一节ID（匹配数据库content_id字段，用<替代<） (SELECT MAX(content_id) FROM driving_content WHERE content_id < t.content_id) AS prevContentId, -- 下一节ID（匹配数据库content_id字段，用>替代>） (SELECT MIN(content_id) FROM driving_content WHERE content_id > t.content_id) AS nextContentId FROM driving_content t WHERE t.content_id = #{contentId}
